DISCOVERY, 302, DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PACIFIC MEDICAL CENTER'S NOTICE OF MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER DISCOVERY RESPONSES, VERIFICATIONS, AND RELEASE OF MEDICAL INFORMATION AND REQUEST FOR SANCTION IS GRANTED AS TO GENERAL FORM INTERROGATORIES 12.7, 13.1, 13.2, AND EMPLOYMENT FORM INTERROGATORIES 215.2 AND 204.2. MOREOVER, THE COURT ALSO RULED ON DOCUMENT REQUEST: #7 IS GRANTED. 	 IS DENIED. THE REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. NOT REPORTED. is Denied.
